message:
test: expand e2e, a11y, golden, and snapshot test coverage

Significantly extends the test suite across multiple dimensions:

Golden testing framework (ftui-harness):
- Refactor golden.rs to support reflow and resize golden tests with
  deterministic terminal size simulation
- Add golden_reflow and golden_resize tests verifying layout stability
  across terminal dimension changes
- Add golden/ fixture directory for reference frames
- Add isomorphism_proofs.rs with mathematical proofs that rendering
  is deterministic across equivalent state transitions

New demo showcase tests:
- backdrop_e2e.rs: end-to-end backdrop effect rendering tests
- layout_composer_ux_a11y.rs: layout composer accessibility tests
- layout_lab_ux_a11y.rs: layout lab UX and accessibility tests
- mouse_playground_ux_a11y.rs: mouse playground accessibility tests
- terminal_capabilities_ux_a11y.rs: terminal capability detection tests
- terminal_e2e.rs: embedded terminal integration tests
- virtualized_search_ux_a11y.rs: virtualized search accessibility tests
- visual_effects_pty.rs: PTY-based visual effect rendering tests

Updated existing tests:
- a11y_snapshots: expand coverage for all accessibility modes and sizes
- advanced_text_editor_ux_a11y: additional word navigation edge cases
- mouse_playground_e2e: comprehensive mouse event handling (+1000 lines)
- screen_snapshots: add snapshot_player and terminal_capabilities screens

Snapshot updates:
- ~90 snapshot files updated to reflect theme token changes, widget
  layout fixes (list/table saturating casts), and visual effect
  parameter adjustments from the prior commits

Scripts:
- demo_showcase_e2e.sh: restructured for parallel test execution
- run_all.sh: add new test modules to runner
- test_embedded_terminal.sh: new script for PTY-based terminal tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
